title: /pth
text: /pth Specify the path name for generation of Java files for Java call-in, or for stub-code generation for C call-in and C call-out.. /pth = WorkDir Used With /sti /sto Description When you use /sto to generate Java files for Java call-in, or you use /sti or /sto to generate C call-in or C call-out stub code, use this subswitch to specify the path where the output will be written. If this subswitch is not supplied, the output will be written into the current working directory. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
